$schema-note: Tool-agnostic token-build contract consumed by docs/design-system/bin/build-tokens. See wave 12atj-feat design-token-build-pipeline.
comment: The seed-emitted default stub uses tool='style-dictionary'. This repo has no Node/Style-Dictionary install (CI has no Node), so it uses the bundled pure-Python transform (tool='builtin'), which deterministically derives every export from the DTCG token source. Switch tool to 'style-dictionary' and run `npm install -D style-dictionary` to use Style Dictionary instead, or tool='custom' with a 'command' for any other pipeline.
